subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. O thou who speaketh forth My remembrance amidst My servants! O thou dawning one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی و یا ایها الناطق بذکری بین عبادی و یا ایها المشرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
